---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    css: styles.css
---

<p style="color:#6b7280; margin-bottom: 6px;">
  You can view my full CV below, or 
  <a href="Feiran_Zhang_resume.pdf" download><i class="fa fa-download"></i> download the PDF</a>.
</p>

<div class="cv-embed-container">
  <iframe src="Feiran_Zhang_resume.pdf" title="Feiran Zhang CV"></iframe>
</div>

<div class="footer-section">
  &copy; 2025 Feiran Zhang &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Built with R Markdown &amp; GitHub Pages
</div>
